source_meta.source_document: Inventory Control Form - VA Distal Tibia Implant Set

systems.system_notes: Variable-angle distal tibia locking plate system within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio for distal tibia and pilon fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official inventory and catalog materials describe the variable-angle distal tibia implant and instrument set.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the variable-angle distal tibia plate family.
Official inventory materials describe compatible screw fixation for the variable-angle distal tibia plate system.
Official technique resources describe guide and instrumentation workflow for variable-angle distal tibia plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the variable-angle distal tibia plate family and inventory references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or broader parts-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
